title: cyperus commixtus
intro: Cyperus commixtus, also known as tiger sedge or mixed flatsedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Cyperus commixtus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. It can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, for its medicinal and therapeutic applications.
